title: December 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 28''' is the 362nd day of the year (363rd in leap years), with 3 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1922|1922]] – [[Stan Lee]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Hilton McRae]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Janice Chiang]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Joe Manganiello]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 28|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 28]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 132|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 132]] published.
*[[1986]] – ''[[George Lucas' Star Tours]]'' 18-minute promotional film released on television.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars: Purge]]'' published.
*2005 – [[Star Wars: General Grievous (TPB)|''Star Wars: General Grievous'' trade paperback]] released.
*[[2010]] – [[Red Harvest (novel)|''Red Harvest'']] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost 3|''Crimson Empire III: Empire Lost'' 3]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars Vol. 3: War of the Bounty Hunters]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 27|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 27]] published.
*2022 – [[Han Solo & Chewbacca 8|''Han Solo & Chewbacca'' 8]] published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic (2022) 3|''The High Republic'' (2022) 3]] published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic — The Blade 1|''The High Republic — The Blade'' 1]] published.
*2022 – [[Yoda 2|''Yoda'' 2]] published.
<noinclude>
